title: JSON response returned as plain text
prompt_text: Return valid JSON with a summary field.
actual_behavior: Returned plain text paragraphs instead of JSON.
summary: gpt-4.1-mini issue (formatting): JSON response returned as plain text

title: System instruction was ignored during summarization
prompt_text: Summarize the ticket in one sentence.
expected_behavior: Return one sentence and follow the system instruction.
actual_behavior: Returned multiple bullet points and ignored the system instruction.
summary: gpt-4.1 issue (instruction following): System instruction was ignored during summarization

title: JSON summary request returned bullet points
prompt_text: Return a JSON object with a summary field only.
expected_behavior: Return valid JSON with one summary field.
actual_behavior: Returned bullet points instead of JSON output.
summary: gpt-4.1 issue (formatting): JSON summary request returned bullet points

title: Style instruction was ignored in final answer
prompt_text: Answer in one short sentence and keep the tone neutral.
expected_behavior: Follow the style instruction and return one short sentence.
actual_behavior: Returned a long answer and ignored the style instruction.
summary: gpt-4.1-mini issue (instruction following): Style instruction was ignored in final answer

title: Product details were hallucinated in the answer
prompt_text: Answer only from the provided product catalog.
expected_behavior: Use only the supplied product details.
actual_behavior: Invented features that were not in the catalog.
summary: gpt-4.1-mini issue (hallucination): Product details were hallucinated in the answer
